issues.description: Missing passive effect: 'This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards.' Should be a Permanent effect with a condition blocking KO from Slash cards.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Effect specifies: look at 5 cards, reveal up to 1 red Event, add to hand, place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL lacks: search scope (5 cards), filter (red Event type), and bottom-deck placement logic.
Filter should specify red Event cards, not 'Any'. Should include color/type constraints.

actions.keyword: Cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards
